suggestions.title: Calendar search treated as proof of absence
suggestions.evidence: Agent: 'No meeting found on your calendar for Wednesday'... User: 'the meeting IS there — you searched by title only and missed it'
suggestions.suggestion: Add rule: calendar_search is title-only and cannot verify attendee presence. Never assert a meeting doesn't exist based on a title search alone. Cross-reference calendar_view data by attendee name instead.

suggestions.title: Retry loop: email_search called 4x with same query
suggestions.evidence: Tool pattern repeated 4 times: email_search with query='meeting notes'
suggestions.suggestion: Add a circuit breaker — after 2 failed searches with the same terms, try alternative search terms or ask the user for clarification instead of retrying.
